title: Viewfinity S6 24 Inch Qhd 100Hz Easysetupstand Ls24D600Eauxen
features: Visual excellence that professionals demand. QHD(2560x1440) resolution and 100Hz refresh rate resolution work together to reveal hidden details through higher pixel density, while reducing lag and motion blur. Dive into intricate designs, complex diagrams and dynamic video content with a smoother workflow.

See a wider gamut of colors for stunning accuracy and detail. HDR10 provide near limitless hues and true-to-life color representation, with darker darks and the brighter brights. Every piece of content becomes a joy to look at and can be experienced exactly as intended.

Featuring HDMI, DP, USB-A and USB-B ports, connecting your peripherals is as straightforward as it gets. This amazing convenience doesn't just simplify your setup but also enhances your productivity by ensuring a seamless workflow.
The Easy Setup Stand effortlessly creates an ideal workspace without any tools or screws. When it's time to change things up, simply push a button and enjoy flexible convenience.
A height-adjustable screen that tilts gives you the best angle and ultimate utility. Now you can also pivot the screen 90 degrees, which is perfect for viewing long documents with less scrolling.

Keep your eyes fresh with less screen strain. For those late-night projects, brightness and color temperature automatically optimize for your environment. TUV-certified for intelligent eye care, Samsung reduces screen flickering and protects eyes against excessive blue light with eye saver mode.

The 2024 Samsung ViewFinity monitors* contain at least 14%** recycled plastic. Plus, we use no chemical sprays on the monitor's plastic, and use glue instead of staples in the packaging box joint, making it possible to recycle them.

specifications.EPEAT: Silver (AT, DK, FR, IT, NL, ES, SE, CH, UK)
